creator: reed@scit.us
text:
9626 drivers exist; although, they are not listed on the beta page.

http://www.nvidia.com/object/freebsd_archive.html

http://www.nvidia.com/object/freebsd_1.0-9626.html

Consider adjusting the patch for these instead of 9625.
